turns.content: Excellent! Now I have a comprehensive understanding of both the **GeoResilience Hub** flyer/image and the detailed service catalog document. Let me also review your profile to cross-reference your capabilities, then draft the brainstorming artifact.

Here's what I've done:

## Summary

I reviewed all three source materials — the **GeoResilience Hub flyer**, the **service catalog document**, and the **flood susceptibility writing sample** — and produced a comprehensive brainstorming artifact covering every dimension of the website project.

### Key Highlights of the Brainstorm

| Section | What It Covers |
|---|---|
| **Brand Analysis** | Extracted logo, colors, tagline, and positioning from your flyer |
| **Site Architecture** | Two options — SPA (recommended Phase 1) vs multi-page (Phase 2) |
| **5 Service Categories** | ~30 service items organized into Mapping, Research, Field Data, Drone, and Training |
| **Portfolio Strategy** | 5 case studies sourced directly from your existing research (Volta floods, Accra UHI, etc.) |
| **Interactive Map Demo** | A live Leaflet.js map showing your flood susceptibility results — the **killer differentiator** |
<truncated 736 bytes>

turns.content: Understood — I'll strip out all personal credentials and rebuild the brainstorm purely from the **flyer image** and the **Word document**. Let me revise.
Let me create a focused brainstorm based solely on the flyer and document.

Done. The brainstorm has been completely revised — **all personal credentials removed**. Everything is now sourced exclusively from the flyer and Word document.

### What the Brainstorm Covers

| Section | Summary |
|---|---|
| **Source Analysis** | Detailed extraction from the flyer (brand, colors, contact, 3 pillars) and the Word doc (5 expanded service categories, ~30 services) |
| **Brand Positioning** | UVPs, brand voice, core positioning statement |
| **Audience Strategy** | 5 client segments with tailored messaging |
| **Site Architecture** | SPA (Phase 1) vs Multi-page (Phase 2) with diagrams |
| **Page-by-Page Content** | Hero, About, Services, Portfolio, Interactive Map, Contact |
| **Design Direction** | Color palette, typography, glassmorphism, hex grid motifs, micro-animations |
| **Tech Stack** | Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS + Leaflet.js, GitHub Pages/Netlify hosting |
| **Phased Roadmap** | 3-phase plan from launch to advanced features |
| **13 Open Questions** | Decisions needed before we code |
